author: bsunanda
body:
#### PR description:

Bug fix to get the correct DetId for the scinitllator part in HGCal (for v17/v18/v19)

#### PR validation:

Checked with script in  SimG4CMS/Calo/test/python

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Should be backported to 16_1_X
title: Phase20hgx366 Bug fix to get the correct DetId for the scinitllator part in HGCal (for v17/v18/v19)
